steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The introductory phrase "Multidisciplinary at its core" must describe the noun that follows it. The sentence needs to say that the artist's body of work is multidisciplinary, not that the artist, the art forms, or a range of art forms is multidisciplinary at its core.

steps.title: Place the work after the comma
steps.content: A places the artist after the modifier, creating a dangling modifier. B places the art forms there, and C places a range of art forms there; neither is the intended noun. The only grammatical completion puts Tsouhlarakis's body of work immediately after the comma. The answer is D.
